triage_flags.notes: mana_cost: {2}{G} present in frontmatter; green-magic present in tags_filter.

trivia_bullets.text: Fear of Exposure is part of the 'Fear of' cycle in DSK: a large cycle of Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cards distributed across all five colors at various rarities, each named after a real-world phobia or social anxiety concept. The Gatherer search for 'Fear of' in DSK and its Commander supplement returns 20 cards.
sources: gatherer.wizards.com: Fear of search in DSK

trivia_bullets.text: As an Enchantment Creature, Fear of Exposure carries DSK's dual enchantment/creature frame. The additional cost of tapping two untapped creatures or lands is oracle text (not a keyword), functioning as a mana-efficiency tax partially offset by a 5/4 Trample body at three mana. Previewed by Indonesian gaming site Duniaku (IDN Times), 2024-09-11.

"A mouth like that can never keep secrets." — the line plays on the psychological concept of exposure (secrets forced into the open) literalized by the creature's gaping maw with trapped faces visible inside.
Illustrated by Josu Hernaiz, a prolific MTG illustrator with over 100 cards across multiple sets. No Hipsters of the Coast artist profile was found for him.

EDHREC rank 16,811 as of Scryfall data pull, placing it in the lower-frequency Commander inclusions from DSK. Its additional cost makes it less appealing in Commander's singleton context where reliably tapping two permanents as early plays is not guaranteed.
